ERBB2.summary: Receptor tyrosine kinase driving tumor cell proliferation and survival when amplified in breast cancer.

KRT7.summary: KRT7 encodes a luminal epithelial cytoskeletal keratin, marking glandular and carcinoma identity.

SCD.summary: SCD desaturates fatty acids to fuel tumor membrane synthesis and proliferation.

EPCAM.summary: EPCAM is a transmembrane adhesion protein broadly overexpressed on carcinoma cells, confirming epithelial tumor identity.

FOXA1.summary: FOXA1 is a pioneer transcription factor that defines luminal breast tumor identity by licensing estrogen-receptor chromatin.

TACSTD2.summary: TACSTD2 (Trop2) is a surface glycoprotein overexpressed in breast carcinoma, marking tumor epithelial identity.

GATA3.summary: GATA3 is a lineage-determining transcription factor that maintains luminal epithelial identity in breast tumors.

SERHL2.summary: The literature on SERHL2 in breast tumor biology is thin.

KRT8.summary: Luminal epithelial cytoskeletal keratin marking luminal breast tumor identity.

ANKRD30A.summary: Breast-restricted differentiation antigen (NY-BR-1) expressed in >70% of breast tumors, confirming luminal epithelial tumor identity.

FASN.summary: Lipogenic enzyme overexpressed in breast tumor epithelial cells, fueling membrane synthesis and proliferation.

MLPH.summary: MLPH (melanophilin) links vesicle transport machinery to luminal breast tumor identity.

CDH1.summary: E-cadherin mediates epithelial cell-cell adhesion, anchoring luminal epithelial and tumor identity.

CD9.summary: Tetraspanin expressed on breast glandular epithelial cells, marking tumor identity and modulating adhesion.

ABCC11.summary: ATP-binding cassette transporter overexpressed in ER-positive breast tumor cells, conferring chemotherapy resistance.

CTTN.summary: Cortactin drives actin remodeling and cytoskeletal invasion in breast glandular tumor cells.

TPD52.summary: Overexpressed proto-oncogene promoting tumor cell proliferation, EMT, and metastasis.

CEACAM6.summary: Cell-adhesion glycoprotein overexpressed on tumor epithelial surfaces, promoting invasion and apoptosis resistance.

MDM2.summary: MDM2 suppresses p53 tumor suppressor activity, driving tumor cell survival when overexpressed.

TOMM7.summary: Mitochondrial protein import subunit sustaining the bioenergetic demands of proliferating breast tumor cells.

NARS.summary: NARS encodes asparaginyl-tRNA synthetase, supporting protein synthesis in proliferating tumor cells.

TCIM.summary: The literature lookup returned no results for TCIM across three queries.

S100A14.summary: Calcium-binding protein marking epithelial-like breast tumor cells and predicting poor TNBC outcome.

LYPD3.summary: GPI-anchored surface glycoprotein overexpressed in carcinomas, marking breast glandular tumor epithelium.

FLNB.summary: Actin-crosslinking protein driving EMT and invasion in breast tumor epithelial cells.

MYO5B.summary: MYO5B drives epithelial vesicle trafficking and polarity.

ADAM9.summary: A cell-surface metalloprotease driving tumor invasion and epithelial-mesenchymal transition in carcinoma cells.

SMS.summary: Spermine synthase drives polyamine biosynthesis, supporting tumor cell survival and proliferation.

HMGA1.summary: Chromatin remodeling protein overexpressed in aggressive cancers, amplifying Wnt signaling to drive tumor progression.

RUNX1.summary: RUNX1 is a transcription factor that suppresses Wnt/beta-catenin signaling in ER-positive breast tumor epithelium.

TRAF4.summary: TRAF4 drives breast cancer cell migration and NF-κB signaling, supporting tumor aggressiveness.

AR.summary: Nuclear androgen receptor expressed in 60, 80% of breast tumor cells, driving proliferation and invasion.

TENT5C.summary: A non-canonical poly(A) polymerase that stabilizes mRNA.

USP53.summary: Deubiquitinase that stabilizes CRKL, driving breast tumor growth, metastasis, and chemoresistance.

TMEM147.summary: ER-resident translocon component supporting multi-pass membrane protein biogenesis.

LARS.summary: LARS encodes leucyl-tRNA synthetase, a tumour suppressor repressed during breast cancer transformation.

ACTG2.summary: Smooth muscle actin isoform linked to EMT and mesenchymal transition.

SH3YL1.summary: A phosphoinositide-binding scaffold that activates Rac1 via Dock4, promoting breast cancer cell migration.

TOP2A.summary: TOP2A encodes DNA topoisomerase IIα, resolving replication stress and marking actively proliferating tumor cells.

QARS.summary: Glutaminyl-tRNA synthetase charges tRNA with glutamine, sustaining the translational and metabolic demands of proliferating tumor cells.

JUP.summary: JUP (plakoglobin) anchors desmosomes in breast glandular epithelial cells, marking tumor identity.

ZNF562.summary: ZNF562 is a supporting marker for Tumor in this cluster.

SEC11C.summary: SEC11C encodes a signal peptidase subunit that cleaves secretory signal peptides in secretory/tumor epithelial cells.

TFAP2A.summary: A tumor-suppressor transcription factor silenced during breast cancer invasion, marking luminal epithelial identity.

SEC24A.summary: SEC24A selects secretory cargo into COPII vesicles at the ER.

VOPP1.summary: VOPP1 activates NF-κB signaling, promoting tumor cell survival and epithelial identity.

SLC5A6.summary: Sodium-dependent multivitamin transporter supporting tumor cell proliferation and mitochondrial function in glandular epithelium.

PCLAF.summary: PCLAF binds PCNA to drive cell cycle progression and is overexpressed in tumor cells.

SRPK1.summary: Phosphorylates splicing factors to drive oncogenic alternative splicing, marking breast glandular tumor identity.

TRAPPC3.summary: TRAPPC3 is a core TRAPP-I subunit mediating ER-to-Golgi vesicle tethering.

RHOH.summary: Hematopoietic-restricted atypical GTPase regulating T cell signaling.

FAM107B.summary: A heat-shock-inducible nuclear protein whose expression is lost in breast and other tumors, supporting tumor identity.

KLF5.summary: Epithelial transcription factor driving tumor cell proliferation.

WARS.summary: WARS encodes tryptophanyl-tRNA synthetase, a chemosensitivity modulator in breast tumor cells.

TUBA4A.summary: TUBA4A encodes alpha-tubulin marking motile cilia in epithelial cells, supporting tumor epithelial identity.

MYBPC1.summary: Slow-skeletal sarcomeric regulator with atypical tumor expression.

CCPG1.summary: ER-phagy receptor sustaining ER homeostasis in secretory tumor epithelial cells.

SDC4.summary: Cell-surface heparan sulfate proteoglycan enriched in breast glandular epithelial and tumor cells, supporting adhesion and mechanosignaling.

OCIAD2.summary: Cancer-upregulated glandular epithelial protein marking malignant progression in breast tumor cells.

KARS.summary: Lysyl-tRNA synthetase fueling protein synthesis, supporting the high translational demand of proliferating tumor cells.

AGR3.summary: Luminal breast epithelial protein disulfide isomerase, enriched in luminal-subtype breast tumors, confirming glandular tumor identity.

PTRHD1.summary: A putative tRNA-recycling enzyme selectively annotated to breast glandular cells, supporting tumor epithelial identity.

TRIB1.summary: A pseudokinase scaffold that drives tumor cell survival and proliferation via PI3K-AKT and MAPK signaling.

MUC6.summary: Secretory mucin protecting epithelial surfaces, preserved in tumor epithelium.

MKI67.summary: Nuclear proliferation marker expressed in actively dividing cells, confirming tumor cell cycling activity.

S100A8.summary: Calcium-binding alarmin linked to breast tumor invasion and poor prognosis.

EIF4EBP1.summary: mTOR-phosphorylated translational repressor whose inactivation drives cap-dependent protein synthesis in breast tumor cells.

DNTTIP1.summary: DNTTIP1 anchors the MiDAC HDAC1/2 corepressor complex, suppressing p53 acetylation to drive tumor cell proliferation.

AQP3.summary: Water and glycerol channel upregulated in ductal epithelial tumor cells, supporting proliferation and invasion.

TUBB2B.summary: A microtubule-cytoskeleton gene overexpressed in breast tumor cells, promoting survival and proliferation.

SFRP4.summary: Secreted Wnt antagonist expressed by a distinct CAF subtype, anchoring stromal identity in breast tumors.

PTGDS.summary: Lipocalin-type prostaglandin D2 synthase secreted by stromal fibroblasts.

PDGFRB.summary: PDGF receptor driving pericyte and stromal fibroblast identity in mesenchymal compartments.

ZEB1.summary: ZEB1 drives epithelial-to-mesenchymal transition, reinforcing mesenchymal gene programs that define stromal identity.

PDK4.summary: PDK4 suppresses mitochondrial glucose oxidation, supporting stromal fibroblast metabolic identity.

PRDM1.summary: PRDM1 (BLIMP1) drives immune terminal effector differentiation.

GJB2.summary: GJB2 (Connexin 26) forms gap junctions mediating intercellular communication.

ADH1B.summary: Alcohol dehydrogenase driving retinoic acid synthesis, supporting endothelial lipid and retinol metabolism.

CPA3.summary: Mast-cell-specific granule protease that defines mast cell identity.
